resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now log in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidLinkMessage: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

confirmDialog.title: Are you sure?
confirmDialog.description: This action may be irreversible. Please confirm to continue.

common.quickActionsHint: Use arrow keys to move and Enter to run

calendar.title: Calendar

subscription.description: Subscribe to your Rawkoon calendar from Apple Calendar, Google Calendar, or any iCal-compatible app.
subscription.revokeConfirm: Are you sure? Existing calendar subscriptions will stop updating.
subscription.regenerateConfirm: Are you sure? Existing calendar subscriptions will need to be re-added.
subscription.instructions: Copy the URL and add it as a calendar subscription, or click "Open in Calendar" to add it automatically.

calendar.comingSoonDescription: We're working on more calendar features to help you stay in sync.

profile.title: Profile
profile.imageRequirements: Supported formats: PNG, JPG, WEBP, GIF. Max size: 5 MB.
profile.maxFileSizeError: Image is too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
profile.avatarUpdateError: Failed to update profile picture. Please try again.
profile.newPasswordPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current password
profile.passwordHelp: Password must be at least 8 characters long
profile.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
profile.updateError: Failed to update profile. Please try again.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Passkeys let you sign in securely without a password using your device's biometrics or PIN.
passkeys.notSupported: Your browser does not support passkeys.

activity.title: Activity
activity.description: Browse the paginated household activity feed with filters.

media.title: Media
media.description: Configure quality profiles, library post-processing, media history, and import workflows.

qualityProfiles.title: Quality profiles
qualityProfiles.listDescription: Rules used to score Prowlarr releases when a library item has a profile assigned.
qualityProfiles.formDescription: Minimum resolution, preferred source and codec order, optional size cap, and HDR rules.
qualityProfiles.name: Name
qualityProfiles.deleteConfirm: Delete profile "{{name}}"? Library items using it will be unassigned.
qualityProfiles.empty: No profiles yet. Use Create profile to add one.

mediaHistory.title: Media history
mediaHistory.description: Review recent grabs, indexer activity, and completion outcomes from the media pipeline.

mediaLibrary.title: Media library
mediaLibrary.description: After torrents complete, Rawkoon can hardlink or move video files into a clean folder layout and optionally remove the torrent from qBittorrent once a seed ratio is reached.
mediaLibrary.minSeedRatio: Remove torrent from qBittorrent when ratio reaches (0 = immediately after processing)
mediaLibrary.noIndexerConfigured: No indexer manager configured. Enable Prowlarr or Jackett in Integrations settings.
mediaLibrary.defaultQualityProfileHint: Automatically assigned to new items added to the library.
mediaLibrary.scanDescription: Walk a folder, match video filenames to TMDB, and add items as already downloaded. Requires TMDB to be configured.

arrImport.title: Import library from Radarr / Sonarr
arrImport.description: One-time migration: scans files with MediaInfo and copies titles into the native library.
arrImport.importFailedUnknown: Import failed with an unknown error

jobs.title: Background Jobs
jobs.description: Monitor and manage scheduled server jobs, queue health, and recent job history.
jobs.error: Failed to execute job. Please try again.

libraryHealth.title: Library Health
libraryHealth.noRuns: No library integrity check has been recorded yet.

history.title: Recent Activity
history.description: Last 50 completed and failed jobs across all queues.

checkReminders.label: Check Reminders
checkReminders.description: Check for reminders that need to be sent and send notifications.

checkAllDayEvents.label: Check All-Day Events
checkAllDayEvents.description: Check for all-day custom events and send notifications.

checkHabitReminders.label: Check Habit Reminders
checkHabitReminders.description: Check for habits that need reminders and send notifications.

cleanupNotifications.label: Cleanup Old Notifications
cleanupNotifications.description: Remove old notifications from the database.

refreshUpcoming.label: Refresh Upcoming
refreshUpcoming.description: Query TMDB for fresh upcoming movies and TV shows.

refreshHabitsStreaks.label: Refresh Habits Streaks
refreshHabitsStreaks.description: Recalculate daily streaks for all user habits.

checkMovieReleaseReminders.label: Check Movie Release Reminders
checkMovieReleaseReminders.description: Send notifications for movies releasing tomorrow (watchlist).

checkLibraryMovieReleases.label: Check Library Movie Releases
checkLibraryMovieReleases.description: Search for newly released movies in your library.

checkLibraryEpisodeReleases.label: Check Library Episode Releases
checkLibraryEpisodeReleases.description: Search for newly released episodes in your library.

syncLibraryShowEpisodes.label: Sync Show Episodes
syncLibraryShowEpisodes.description: Sync episode metadata from TMDB for all library shows.

checkLibraryDownloadCompletion.label: Check Download Completion
checkLibraryDownloadCompletion.description: Check grabbed items for completed downloads and post-process.

syncLibraryAttentionAlerts.label: Sync Library Attention Alerts
syncLibraryAttentionAlerts.description: Create, refresh, and auto-resolve dashboard library attention alerts from current grabs and cron state.

checkLibraryIntegrity.label: Check Library Integrity
checkLibraryIntegrity.description: Detect library records that have drifted from disk and TMDB state.

refreshGithubReleases.label: Refresh GitHub Releases
refreshGithubReleases.description: Fetch public GitHub releases, update the Redis cache, and notify admins for new app versions.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Service tokens for external integrations like Labby. Send the key in the x-api-key header.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.revokeConfirm: Revoke this API key? Any integration using it will stop working immediately.
apiKeys.createDescription: Give the key a name. The key is shown only once after it is created.
apiKeys.expiryRange: Expiration must be a whole number of days between 1 and 365
apiKeys.createdKeyWarning: This is the only time the key will be shown. Copy it somewhere safe.

sessions.title: Sessions & Tokens
sessions.sessionsDescription: All active refresh tokens (mobile sessions). Revoking a session will force the user to log in again.
sessions.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke this session?
sessions.revokeAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke all sessions for {{email}}?
sessions.deleteWebPushConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this web push subscription?
sessions.deleteWebPushError: Failed to delete web push subscription.

users.title: Users
users.listDescription: Manage all users in the application.
users.name: Name
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete user {{email}}? This action cannot be undone.
users.inviteDescription: Send an invitation email to add a new user.
users.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke the invitation for {{email}}?

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect third-party integrations used by the dashboard.
integrations.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid URL (e.g. https://example.com)

jellyfin.help: Connect Jellyfin to fetch the latest items added to your media server.

tmdb.help: Configure TMDB so upcoming releases and media search can query TMDB from the server.
tmdb.popularityThresholdHelp: Minimum TMDB popularity score (0–100) for upcoming releases. Higher values show only mainstream titles.

rssPolling.label: RSS Polling
rssPolling.help: Select indexers to poll every 15 minutes for new releases. Matched items are grabbed immediately without waiting for the scheduled search.
rssPolling.noIndexers: No indexers found. Save your credentials first.

prowlarr.help: Connect Prowlarr to run global release searches and send results to your configured download client.

jackett.help: Connect Jackett to run global release searches across your configured indexers.

qbittorrent.help: Connect qBittorrent to display live download queue stats on the dashboard.
qbittorrent.passwordPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep existing password
qbittorrent.setupNote: Configure webhooks so Rawkoon can post-process completed grabs and track Rawkoon-category torrents as soon as they are added.
qbittorrent.configureWebhooksError: Failed to configure qBittorrent webhooks. Check that qBittorrent is reachable from Rawkoon.

sso.title: SSO / OIDC Providers
sso.help: Add any OpenID Connect provider (Authentik, Authelia, Keycloak, etc.) to enable SSO login.
sso.iconUrlHelp: Optional. Displayed on the login page and in the session list.
sso.providerSlugHelp: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Cannot be changed after creation.
sso.clientSecretPlaceholderSet: Leave blank to keep existing secret
sso.redirectUriHelp: Add this URL as an allowed redirect URI in your identity provider.
sso.deleteConfirmHelp: This will remove the provider and any users who signed in through it will lose SSO access.

blocklist.title: Blocklist
blocklist.description: Releases here are never grabbed automatically. Block a release from search to keep it out of every future download.
blocklist.empty: Nothing's blocked. Block a release from search to keep it from being grabbed again.
blocklist.hint: The grabber skips these releases on every search, RSS sync, and upgrade.
blocklist.unblockConfirm: Unblock "{{title}}"? The grabber will be free to download it again.

remux.title: Remux Files
remux.description: Strip audio and subtitle tracks from all .mkv files, keeping only the selected languages. Files are modified in place.

library.emptyDescription: Search for movies or shows in the panel on the right and add them to your library.

upgradeModal.movieDescription: Your current file doesn't meet the new profile. How would you like to find an upgrade?

upgradeModal.showDescription_other: {{count}} downloaded episodes don't meet the new profile. How would you like to find upgrades?
upgradeModal.showManualNote: You'll be able to search episode by episode in the search tab.

error.conditionsEmpty: At least one condition is required
